scripts.packages:test: bun run --filter @trading25/contracts test && bun run --filter @trading25/utils test && bun run --filter @trading25/api-clients test
scripts.quality:typecheck: bun run --filter @trading25/contracts bt:generate-types && bun run quality:typecheck:root && bun run --filter @trading25/api-clients typecheck && bun run quality:typecheck:web && bun run quality:deps:audit
scripts.workspace:build: bun run api-clients:build && bun run --filter @trading25/contracts build:local && bun run --filter @trading25/utils build:local && bun run web:build
scripts.workspace:test: bun run root:test && bun run packages:test && bun run apps:test
scripts.workspace:test:coverage: bun run --filter @trading25/contracts test:coverage && bun run --filter @trading25/utils test:coverage && bun run --filter @trading25/api-clients test:coverage && bun run --filter @trading25/web test:coverage
